/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11 -Wall -Wextra -Wfatal-errors -ggdb3 -O2 -march=native -mtune=native -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/demo_r1cs_ppzkadsnark.dir/zk_proof_systems/ppzkadsnark/r1cs_ppzkadsnark/examples/demo_r1cs_ppzkadsnark.cpp.o -o demo_r1cs_ppzkadsnark  libsnark_adsnark.a libsnark.a ../depends/libff/libff/libff.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so -lgmp -lgmpxx ../depends/libzm.a ../depends/libsnark_supercop.a -lcrypto
